HYPE.fallback_reason: Binance spot unavailable/unsupported (spot HYPEUSDT: HTTP 400: {"code":-1121,"msg":"Invalid symbol."}); used Binance public USD-M futures market data.

notes: Binance public spot ticker and klines are attempted first for mapped crypto assets.
If Binance spot is unsupported/unavailable, public Binance USD-M futures may be used as a labelled fallback before existing dashboard sources.
No private exchange credentials are used and no real orders are placed.

generator_health.summary: Generator sees 7 market assets, 15 trading-bible assets, 7 signals, 4320 snapshots, and 10682 OHLC rows.

regime.summary: Derivatives regime leans crowded long / upside squeeze watch.

update_log: v2.05: overlaid mapped crypto assets with Binance public realtime spot ticker/klines where available.
v2.05: added per-asset provenance fields including source, timestamp, symbol pair, endpoint/method, and fallback reason.
v2.05: added an explicit simulated ledger artifact link; dashboard signals do not imply real orders.
v2.04: added derivatives summary to the canonical dashboard payload.
v2.04: attached per-asset derivatives compact fields for BTC, ETH, SOL, and ZEC.
v2.04: added spot-price fallback so liquidation zones can still compute when exchange mark price is blocked.
v2.04: prepared reader-facing update log support for the dashboard UI.

macro_context.purpose: Cross-asset confirmation for risk tone, commodities, and equity-index context

limitations: Uses Binance public market-data endpoints only; no real orders are placed.
Dashboard action-engine events do not auto-fill watch-only setups.
Open positions, when present, are imported from the local copilot paper portfolio JSON and marked simulated.
Execution price, slippage, fees, and exits remain paper-model placeholders unless a dedicated simulator updates them.
